sentences.text: Thank you for calling all year management your call may be monitored for quality purposes. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time for company information. Please dial one. If you are a tenant please dial two for accounts payable, please dial four for emergency repairs, please dial five for company directory, please dial nine. For Patsy dial one zero, one. Four S D dial one zero two for Henry dial one zero for for David dial, one zero five for a dial one zero six for semi, dial one one to dial one, one three four yet S dial one, one, four four mulkey dial one one five. Your call is being transferred.
Hi is this the number for you I huh.
